title: Replace Drizzle .get() with .limit(1) in session layer files
consumer_purpose: Enable Postgres compatibility by removing SQLite-only .get() calls from session-layer Drizzle queries
claim_atoms: session.ts: 2 .get() calls replaced with .limit(1) using Pattern 1 (Effect)
projectors.ts: 3 .get() calls replaced with .limit(1) using Pattern 3 (Sync chaining)
message-v2.ts: 2 .get() calls replaced with .limit(1).then(rows => rows[0]) using Pattern 2 (Expression)
prompt.ts: 2 .get() calls replaced with .limit(1).then(rows => rows[0]) using Pattern 2 (Expression)
All replacements verified via bun typecheck from packages/opencode
